note: B.3 selector-less bare-ETH stake. Sending ETH with EMPTY calldata + value > 0 to wstETH hits its payable receive(), which stakes the ETH via Lido AND wraps the resulting stETH to wstETH in one step, minting wstETH to the sender. It has NO 4-byte function selector, so it is keyed under the reserved sentinel selector 0x00000000 (the all-zero word; the WASM route substitutes it ONLY for empty calldata, so it cannot collide with a real dispatch). Decoded as liquid_staking.stake with amount=$tx.value (the staked ETH) — the primary intent is staking ETH; the wstETH-vs-stETH output token is a wrap refinement not represented in StakeAction.
